case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JESUS EDUARDO ECHEVERRIA BAEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ECHEVERRIA BAEZ, JESUS EDUARDO $2,043.42 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,148.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JESUS EDUARDO ECHEVERRIA BAEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,043.42 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ECHEVERRIA BAEZ, JESUS EDUARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ECHEVERRIA BAEZ, JESUS EDUARDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ECHEVERRIA BAEZ, JESUS EDUARDO
